children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Whoever violates subsection (a)(1), (b), (c), or (d) of section 26 of the Animal Welfare Act shall be fined under this title, imprisoned for not more than 5 years, or both, for each violation.

children.heading: .—Attending an Animal Fighting Venture
children.label: b .—Attending an Animal Fighting Venture
children.text: Whoever violates subsection (a)(2)(A) of section 26 of the Animal Welfare Act () shall be fined under this title, imprisoned for not more than 1 year, or both, for each violation.7 U.S.C. 2156

children.heading: 16.—Causing an Individual Who Has Not Attained the Age ofTo Attend an Animal Fighting Venture
children.label: c 16.—Causing an Individual Who Has Not Attained the Age ofTo Attend an Animal Fighting Venture
children.text: Whoever violates subsection (a)(2)(B) of section 26 () of the Animal Welfare Act shall be fined under this title, imprisoned for not more than 3 years, or both, for each violation.7 U.S.C. 2156
